name: clear2close-txm
description: Clear2Close Transaction Management — real estate transaction workflow automation

scripts.migrate: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {readFileSync} = require('fs'); const {Pool} = require('pg'); const pool = new Pool({connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL, ssl: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production' ? {rejectUnauthorized: false} : false}); pool.query(readFileSync('./server/db/schema.sql','utf8')).then(() => {console.log('Migration complete'); process.exit(0);}).catch(e => {console.error(e); process.exit(1);})"
